interactions.observed: Maximized release stage showed all eight named employees with distinct body, hair, clothing, and head silhouettes; normal build contained no P0 sequencer.
Ryan Torres (QA) Appearance preview showed happy eyes, chest role badge, and the checklist work prop.
Four explicit template colors were each represented by a selected Current custom swatch; six neutral skin tones, seven unique hair colors, and all ten outfit colors remained selectable.

Gender presentation switched Masc to Neutral while the 3D controls and rig appearance remained independent; the UI states that gender affects only the 2D reference. Runtime URI hashes for neutral/masculine/feminine were all distinct.
The live preview rendered a continuous chunky curl cap outside the face, capsule head, stocky XZ silhouette, dress geometry, happy eyes, and role prop.
Zara Okafor (UX Designer) rendered the Design role badge and swatch prop with long-hair silhouette.
After editing gender, hair, body, head, and outfit, Reset restored Masc/Short/Slim/Round/Blazer and disabled both Reset and Save.

logs.source: macOS unified log for process offisim-desktop, final 20 minute window
logs.note: macOS AppIntents/pasteboard/audio sandbox registration noise was excluded from product fatal matching; no WebGL, asset, panic, uncaught, unhandled, black-screen, or renderer-crash signature was present.
